01:28:02	Kamil Salakhiev:	curious how this works with bls today, will check later
01:28:36	Will Corcoran:	Replying to "If the proposer sign..."

So, the goal is to have a single proof/signature that can be used to both:

a) verify the block
b) and to aggregate proposer attestations cleanly with other attestations in the network

?
01:29:27	unnawut:	Replying to "curious how this wor..."
